PublicRemarks: Welcome to this exceptional and immaculate 4 bedroom, 2.5-bath colonial set on over 2 picturesque acres in the award-winning Unionville-Chadds Ford School District, offering the perfect blend of modern design, thoughtful upgrades, and serene surroundings with no HOA restrictions. From the moment you arrive, the home’s curb appeal and peaceful setting on a lightly traveled road set the tone. Step inside to a bright, two-story Foyer enhanced by custom shiplap detailing, creating an immediate sense of warmth and style. The main level features a desirable open floor plan with abundant natural light and newer hardwood flooring throughout most of the first floor. The heart of the home is the beautifully appointed Eat-In Kitchen, complete with granite countertops, a center island, sleek cabinetry, recessed lighting, pantry, pot rack, and stainless steel appliances including a gas range - perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. The Kitchen flows seamlessly into a spacious Breakfast Area with sliding glass doors to the rear deck offering amazing views of the bucolic countryside out back, and access to the stunning Family/Great Room with soaring cathedral ceilings and a cozy gas fireplace. Additional main-level highlights include formal Living and Dining Rooms enriched with hardwood flooring, custom moldings, and refined finishes added by the current owners, as well as a private Office with French doors - ideal for today’s work-from-home lifestyle. A convenient Mudroom/Laundry Room with interior access to the 2-car garage completes the first floor. Upstairs, retreat to the spacious Primary Bedroom En-Suite featuring a tray ceiling with ceiling fan, walk-in closet, and a luxurious en-suite Bath with a soaking tub, dual vanity, and separate shower. Three additional generously sized bedrooms share a well-appointed hall bath. The 4th Bedroom even has its own sitting room! The second floor also features brand new carpeting (2024), offering a fresh, move-in ready feel. The full basement provides excellent potential with high ceilings and legal egress, ready to be finished for additional living space if desired. Outside, enjoy the expansive deck overlooking a sweeping backyard that backs to an amazing open space, showcasing breathtaking views of the Brandywine river valley. Enhancing both function and charm, the sellers have added a shed and barn (2019), ideal for storage, hobbies, or outdoor enjoyment. Additional upgrades include a full interior repaint (2019), extensive wainscoting and trim enhancements (2021), and a newer water heater (2021), giving buyers peace of mind and a truly turnkey experience. With nearly 3,000 square feet of living space, thoughtful updates throughout, and a flexible settlement timeline, this home offers a rare opportunity to enjoy space, style, and location all in one. Enjoy all the perks of country living while still accessing everything easily at your fingertips: all kinds of shopping and dining in nearby towns of West Chester and Kennett Square, easy access to parks and trails including Longwood Gardens, and a short drive to major routes for commuting. Don’t miss your chance to make it yours!

AgentRemarks: 525 Raspberry Lane for sale for $750,000 only if purchased with this home, will be up for sale next year on its own. No need to pre-register clients for open houses, all agency honored.
PublicRemarks: Adjoining property also available, more photos coming. Built in 1761 and thoughtfully refined in 1950 and 1997, this classic stone farmhouse perfectly balances the gravity of history with the grace of modern comfort. Inside, the home unfolds with grand-scale rooms featuring original hardwoods and  woodwork. The current 6-bedroom layout offers incredible flexibility, including a sprawling primary suite that could easily be re-imagined into four separate bedrooms—creating a 9-bedroom home for the ultimate family compound or guest retreat. The modern kitchen is warm and welcoming, with freshly refinished floors, beautiful wood cabinets, skylights and banks of windows in the dining area. Heritage details abound from the authentic root cellar, intricate metalwork on the doors and exterior lights, two fireplaces, original doors and windows, pocket doors, oiled woodwork, and deep-set windows. Plus you get modern amenities like pure drinking water provided by a dedicated distiller, all public utilities, and a metal roof that was installed in March of this year. Rounding out the interior is a massive basement with an outside entrance plus a huge root cellar that vents to outside. The grounds provide the backbone to create your dream garden. Just off the kitchen is a matching historic stone smokehouse leading to stone walls draped in fragrant wisteria.  Make this your sanctuary featuring a mini orchard of apple, cherry, plum, fig, and native paw paw trees. Perhaps the most intriguing feature is the original ice house foundation—a 20-foot diameter, deep circular stone well that serves as a stunning architectural focal point. This could be incorporated into a redesign of that portion of the property as there are plans showing the driveway moved to Raspberry Lane. Please note that half of the fenced in yard for 525 Raspberry lane is part of this property, the fence can be moved to the correct property line before settlement. All of this just outside West Chester borough, a quick hop to dining, entertainment, and shopping and an easy drive into Philadelphia or Wilmington. For those seeking a true multi-generational estate, a second residence on the adjoining parcel is available exclusively with the main home for an additional $750,000. 525 Raspberry Lane is a 2,400 SF 3 bedroom/2 bath carriage house  featuring a soaring great room with vaulted ceilings, exposed beams,  a massive three-season room, fenced-in yard, and gorgeous gardens. Parking is also available on Raspberry Lane. Open houses May 1st 5-7,  2nd 11-1, 3rd 12-2, all agents honored.

PublicRemarks: Designed with both equestrian and hobby farm lifestyles in mind, this property is exceptionally well-suited for keeping horses or other animals. The impressive 6-stall barn is thoughtfully outfitted with a wash stall, walk-up hay loft, great lighting, and dedicated tractor storage, making daily care and maintenance both efficient and convenient. Fenced pastures with automatic waterers provide a safe, low-maintenance setup for grazing, while the open acreage, wooded areas, and natural spring-fed stream create a healthy, scenic environment for animals to thrive. Recent updates throughout the property enhance both functionality and peace of mind, allowing the next owner to step right in and enjoy a well-maintained, turnkey farmette experience. The 4-bedroom, 2 1/2 bath home is in move-in condition, offering a bright and welcoming interior highlighted by enormous windows that fill the space with natural light. A charming wraparound porch provides the perfect spot to relax and enjoy the peaceful surroundings. The walk-out lower level adds valuable flexibility, featuring a potential 5th bedroom with a cozy wood stove—ideal for guests, extended living, or a private retreat. Adding even more versatility is the floored, walk-up third level/attic, offering abundant storage or the potential for future finished space such as a home office, studio, or additional living area. This extra level provides room to grow while keeping everything easily accessible. This property has been extensively upgraded both inside and out, with a strong focus on major systems, equestrian functionality, and overall livability. Key highlights include a new roof, siding, gutters, and major mechanicals (furnace, A/C, propane tank, and upgraded water filtration), along with a new septic tank—covering many of the big-ticket items buyers care about. Inside, the home features a complete kitchen remodel, updated flooring, a new fireplace insert, and thoughtful additions like built-ins and improved layout for additional bedroom space. For equestrian and farm use, the property has seen significant investment: upgraded barn electric, a concrete barn floor, tack room improvements, automatic waterers, new fencing and expanded pastures, a muck pit, wash stall, and improved access with a regraded driveway. Additional structures include a pole barn and custom tractor shed. Outdoor living and land enhancements are equally impressive, with a rebuilt deck, patio, firepit, landscaping, drainage improvements, and refreshed driveway/paddock footing. Ask for details on the TESLA solar panels.

PublicRemarks: Welcome to 585 Brighton Way — A 4 bedroom, 3 full baths, & 2 half baths refined brick colonial offering thoughtful upgrades, & beautifully curated indoor-outdoor living in "Valley Forge Woods". Set on a beautifully landscaped lot, this residence combines timeless architecture with meaningful updates.  A grand two-story foyer introduces the home w/ hardwood flooring & an elegant staircase. To the right is the private office & to the left the living room-dining room combination, (this space can easily accommodate an unusually large table for holiday entertaining),…all filled with natural light. The layout transitions effortlessly into the heart of the home—an updated kitchen featuring custom cabinetry, a substantial center island, & generous prep & gathering space. The adjoining breakfast area is surrounded by windows & flows seamlessly into the two-story family room, where a floor to ceiling brick, natural gas, dramatic fireplace &  the two story wall of windows create a warm yet dramatic focal point. The private home office w/ custom built-ins offers a polished work-from-home setting, while the home’s thoughtful design provides both openness and defined spaces for everyday living and entertaining. The owners invested in an enlarged mud room w/ custom built-in lockers & a separate laundry room w/ custom cabinetry- both off of the 3 car garage w/ an additional door to the back yard. Upstairs, the primary suite is a true retreat, offering a spacious bedroom w/ tray ceiling a separate sitting room, & a fully renovated, spa-inspired bathroom complete w/ a freestanding soaking tub, oversized glass shower, dual vanities, & elevated finishes. The 3 additional bedrms are generously sized, two of the bedrooms share a Jack & Jill bathroom that has been renovated/updated. The third bedroom is serviced by the hallway full bathroom. The open hallway overlook enhances the home’s airy, architectural feel & features custom built in cabinetry . The lower level, finished basement, is designed for enjoyment, w/ custom wet bar & recreation space, ideal for entertaining, game days, or casual gatherings. This finished basement also features two more offices, a half bathrm, a play space, w/ storage closet for games, etc…. plus two, unfinished separate storage spaces. Outdoors, the property truly distinguishes itself. A custom hardscaped patio w/ seating wall, ambient lighting, and multiple entertaining zones creates a private, resort-like setting. The expansive fenced yard, mature trees, & thoughtful landscaping provide both beauty and privacy—perfect for quiet evenings or hosting guests.  The sellers have made significant investments in the home over time, including an updated custom kitchen, laundry, & mudroom renovation – all serviced w/ radiant heated floors, in 2007 ($178,000), a fully remodeled primary bathrm in 2024 ($52,640), & a Jack & Jill bathrm renovation in 2024 ($22,516). Additional major improvements include a finished basement in 2001 ($27,452), HVAC system replacement in 2014 ($23,500), &  a raised rear patio installation in 2006 ($22,965). The home also features a roof replacement in 2019 ($15,115), hot tub installation in 2024 ($12,773), & new second-floor carpeting in 2021 ($7,185), along w/ primary bathrm cabinetry updates in 2023 ($6,257). Luxurious hardwood floors and soaring 12 foot ceilings flow seamlessly through the foyer, living room, dining room, breakfast/sunroom, and both bedrooms. The elegant dining room showcases architectural columns and a tray ceiling, while the spacious living room features abundant natural light, and a cozy remote-controlled gas fireplace. Whether attending a luncheon hosted by the Forgers Club or joining neighbors for coffee and crafts, there’s always something fun happening at Downing Forge. Downing Forge sits on the banks of the Brandywine River and borders the historic borough of Downingtown. Enjoy low-maintenance living and an active lifestyle in this exceptional home and community!

PublicRemarks: Welcome to 63 Line Rd (Malvern PA) a destination that will serve as your home and vacation property in one, hitting the market in April 2026!  Located on 2.25 pristine acres (overlooking a 2 acre pond) in the Great Valley school district, just a 5-minute drive to the Malvern train station, 30-minute drive to the airport, located moments from major parks and shopping centers and minutes from Applebrook and White Manor country clubs.   This home features just over 3,000 sq feet of fully renovated luxury (plus recent 2 zone HVAC replacement, 2021 & 2022), including 4 bedrooms (formerly 5 bedrooms/ conversion to large walk in closet), 3 and a half bathrooms and walk-in storage space unseen for the time-period of construction.  Enjoy your morning coffee on the porch overlooking the pond or your evening cocktails on the porch off your master suite watching the sunset (160 sq ft each).  The full property is fenced so that your children and furry-family members will not wander off!  The second floor and backyard feature two expansive decks (800+ sq ft) perfect for family time or entertaining.  Peace of mind is brought by having a whole house generator (installed 2024), so no matter the season or storm, your house will remain fully operational.  Mature landscaping with beautiful colors pop-up every season, walking trails throughout the back yard make for great adventures, enjoy fishing in the well-stocked pond and gatherings around the fire pit in the back yard. The owner thoughtfully renovated this property over the last 7 years, so that it is turn-key.  The first floor features an open floor plan with easy access to the front porch and is perfectly designed for entertaining or quiet evenings sitting by the wood burning stove in the family room or fireplace in the living room.  The kitchen features soft-closing cherry cabinets, granite counter-tops, newer appliances and under cabinet lighting.  There is ample walk in storage throughout the first floor of the house, a powder room, a semi-finished utility room that serves as a home-gym / workshop, as well as a wet bar for entertaining. The second floor features hard wood floors throughout, a large, private master suite, 3 nice-sized bedrooms, two full hall bathrooms, a laundry closet and a large walk in storage closet.   The master suite features a large en-suite bathroom with farmer-tub, shower stall and a large walk incloset (converted 5th bedroom).   All 3 upstairs bathrooms feature carreramarble vanities and tile work.   House was repainted in 2024. Some of the key renovations that make this home worry-free: • Full house generator added in 2024 • All windows replaced (2020) and under a transferrable warranty • Both HVAC zones replaced (2021 and 2022) and converted to propane (owned 500 gallon propane tank which offers flexibility for propane purchases) • All exterior doors replaced (2019 & 2022) • Wood stove and wood insert replaced (2019), with both chimneys relined (2019 & 2025) • Chimney (both) capping resealed (March 2026) • Most copper pipes replaced with pex material (2019) • All gutters replaced with 6” gutters and leaf guards (2020) • Garage doors and garage door openers replaced (2020) • Roof deck (23’ x 25’) refinished and new 15’ x 16’ extension deck added • New flooring in kitchen, family room, living room and all bathrooms • Freshly sealed driveway (April 2026) • Freshly sealed garage floor (April 2026) • Well pump and water neutralizing system replaced (2024) • Septic pipes replaced (2019) • Shed roof and doors replaced (perfect for storing all your outdoor toys) • Roof replaced in 2016 by previous owner No HOA-fees, except a once-yearly pond inspection fee ($160/each), shared by the 5 homes the co-own the pond.

AgentRemarks: Per HUD guidelines, only owner-occupant bids may be submitted during the first 15 days of the listing. However, no offers can be reviewed by HUD until day 11. Investor submissions open on day 16 . The listing agent is not informed of any existing offers and is only notified once a winning bid has been selected. All offers must be submitted directly to HUD via HUDhomestore.gov. Before showing the property, please check HUDhomestore.gov. If the property is no longer listed, an offer may have been accepted. In that case, contact the listing agent to confirm availability. If the property is still active on the HUD site, you should proceed with the showing. Disclosures, condition reports, sales documents, and instructions for registering and submitting bids are all available at HUDhomestore.gov. Buyer agents must be present for all showings and inspections. Granting buyers unaccompanied access to the property is both an ethics violation and a serious breach of HUD guidelines.
PublicRemarks: Opportunity knocking in the Borough of Downingtown, offering strong upside for a buyer willing to renovate. This circa 1900 detached home features approx. 1,829 sq ft with 3 bedrooms and 1 bath on a level lot with a detached garage.  The interior is dated throughout and will require cosmetic updates and likely system improvements; kitchen, bath, flooring, and finishes are in need of replacement. Exterior shows deferred maintenance, including roof and porch attention. Functional layout with good room sizes and a finished attic provides potential to add value. Public water/sewer and convenient borough location close to local amenities. Ideal for owner-occupant renovation or investor. This is a Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) property (Case#  441-959004). This property is being sold as-is, with no guarantees or warranties provided. Utilities may be turned off, so please exercise caution when viewing the property. Daylight showings are recommended. All property details, including disclosures, the Property Condition Report (PCR), sale contract, and sale process, are available on HUDHomestore. Buyers are responsible for any costs associated with activating utilities for inspections, if permitted. If the plumbing system fails the pressure test, water cannot be activated for inspections. Additionally, Use & Occupancy (U&O) inspections are the buyer’s responsibility and expense. For financing and closing, FHA and conventional loans must close within 45 days, FHA 203(k) financing within 60 days, and cash offers within 30 days. The buyer is responsible for all closing costs, including transfer tax. The property is considered to be FHA Insurable with Escrow (IE).  The final escrow amount is subject to lender determination. This is an Equal Housing Opportunity property.

PublicRemarks: Welcome to 127 Cloverly Lane—a meticulously maintained 4-bedroom, 2.5-bath home nestled in the highly sought-after Clover Lea neighborhood, where opportunities like this rarely come to market.  As you make your way up the walkway, you’ll immediately notice that spring has sprung, with the beautifully landscaped front yard bursting with color and curb appeal. The brick front porch welcomes you to the front door and into a center hallway featuring hardwood floors and neutral paint, creating a warm and inviting first impression. To the right, a spacious living room is filled with wonderful natural light from an abundance of windows, complemented by crown molding and hardwood floors. This versatile space can easily serve as a traditional living room, home office, or playroom, with the added convenience of a door that leads directly into the family room. To the left, the formal dining room is equally impressive, featuring a large window, hardwood floors, and elegant crown molding, all highlighted by a showstopping chandelier. Double doors provide a seamless transition into the kitchen, perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. The beautiful kitchen is truly a chef’s dream, showcasing an array of high-end upgrades. It features stunning custom Plato cherry cabinetry, elegant marble countertops, and a gorgeous custom marble-topped island. Premium appliances include a Wolf stove, Sub- Zero refrigerator, and Miele dishwasher, combining luxury, performance, and style. A lovely chandelier hangs above the kitchen table area, adding warmth and charm to the space—perfect for everyday meals or casual gatherings. The family room flows seamlessly from the kitchen and offers a warm, inviting atmosphere with beautiful hardwood floors and a striking 6-inch stone wall featuring a gas fireplace. French doors open to a breathtaking addition, showcasing vaulted, double-height ceilings, hardwood floors, a wall of windows that fills the space with natural light, new skylight and wet bar—creating the perfect setting for both relaxing and entertaining. Rounding out the first floor is a convenient laundry area just off the kitchen, complete with a door leading to the backyard and direct access to the two-car garage, as well as a well-appointed powder room. As you head upstairs, you arrive at the lovely, large primary bedroom featuring hard wood floors, custom built-ins, interior louvered shutters, and a spacious walk-in closet with a thoughtfully designed closet organizer. The ensuite bathroom is truly stunning, boasting marble floors, an antique vanity with marble countertop, a walk-in shower, soaking tub, and  skylight that floods the space with natural light—creating a spa-like retreat. The hallway features hardwood floors, two linen closets, and a full bathroom with a walk-in shower, a vanity with marble top, and tower-style upper cabinets—blending classic charm with modern functionality. Rounding out the second floor are three additional generously sized bedrooms, each featuring hardwood floors, interior louvered shutters, ample windows that allow beautiful natural light to fill the rooms, and good closet space to accommodate all your storage needs. Two staircases lead down to the spacious finished basement, which combines functionality with style. Hardwood floors run throughout the space, including a multipurpose area currently used as a gym. French doors open to a wonderful home office, while the main area is bright and inviting, featuring a custom built-in entertainment center and plenty of storage.  Additionally, a large section of unfinished space provides ideal room for extra storage or future projects and includes a custom cedar closet—perfect for keeping seasonal items and valuables protected. The beautiful backyard is easily accessible through three entrances: from the laundry room, the vaulted addition, or the basement. This seamless connection to the outdoors creates an ideal setting for entertaining, relaxing.

PublicRemarks: Welcome to 2490 White Horse Road.  "Meadowmist" is a fully renovated, classically and elegantly designed 4 bedroom traditional style home sited on the highest elevation of six picture-perfect acres on one of Easttown Township's most coveted winding country roads.  Privacy abounds as the house is approached up a long driveway to the back of the lot. "Meadowmist" truly combines luxurious living with breathtaking scenery. Additional supporting structures include a 3 car detached garage with upstairs heated and air conditioned living space and a full bath, a small 2 stall stable, a garden shed and a fenced tennis / basketball / sport court.  A discreetly placed indoor swimming pool with attached spa room rounds out the resort feel of Meadowmist. No detail was overlooked in the home’s recent transformations, from high-end finishes and designer touches to upgraded "smart" features. Enter through a covered stoop into a sweeping two-story formal entrance. One will immediately feel the comforts of home by gleaming hardwood floors, custom millwork, neutral paint, abundant windows with luxurious treatments, designer light fixtures, a state-of-the-art Lutron® lighting system and three fireplaces. The sunlit dining room features a wood burning fireplace, bespoke glass cabinetry and beautiful countryside views. The chef's kitchen boasts a large center island, white inset cabinetry with marble countertops, Subzero® and Thermador® appliances and a walk-in pantry.  The inviting large family room's custom built-ins will delight, providing a casual yet elegant family and friends gathering space with gas fireplace.  Direct access to a panoramic sunroom-dining space with heated synthetic slate floors, coffered-beadboard ceiling and expansive views of the rolling acreage.  A gracious living room, also with gas fireplace and a private office with custom built-ins, expanded laundry suite, and half bath complete the first floor. Upstairs, the primary suite includes every upgrade and amenity imaginable, from a separate sitting room with window seat and custom built-ins to designer his and hers walk-in closets. The spa-like ensuite bath features a soaking tub beneath a tall arched window, dual vanities, water closet, heated floors and oversized shower with bench.  The second bedroom has a large sitting room/office space with built-ins and hall bath and the third bedroom has a renovated ensuite bath.  The third floor houses the expansive fourth bedroom suite with lounge and renovated bath, and extra storage. The lower level is a wellness haven anchored by a freshly painted, windowed pool house with beamed ceiling and stone accents, lap lane, hot tub, new sauna and a meditation room with oversized full bathroom with steam shower.  An adjacent kitchenette and lower-level finished rec room add convenience and versatility.  There is an auto lock keypad for both entrances to pool / spa area providing extra security & peace of mind. Outside, enjoy a multi-tiered stone terrace, discreetly sited tennis and basketball/sport court and secondary hot tub. The entire second floor above the detached three-car garage with a full bath and kitchenette is the perfect in-law suite, 5th bedroom  or home office. Located in top-rated T/E School District and is just minutes from all the Main Line has to offer including Amtrak (Paoli) and Local R5 train service. Continue along White Horse Road to the 90 Acre Kirkwood Preserve for a truly Country experience with mowed walking trails.  This majestic estate exudes luxury and natural beauty at every turn in a fabulous location.

PublicRemarks: Set on 5.5 private acres within Indian Run Farm, this custom-built Weaver Construction residence is offered for the first time and presents a rare combination of timeless craftsmanship, generous living space, and a serene natural setting. Located in Malvern, the property offers convenient proximity to Main Line amenities, major commuting routes, regional rail, and the Tredyffrin/Easttown School District.  The home offers over 5,100 square feet of thoughtfully designed living space with 4 bedrooms, 5 full bathrooms, and 1 half bath.  A welcoming foyer is flanked by a light-filled home office with custom built-in cabinetry and a formal dining room, setting a refined yet inviting tone. The gourmet kitchen serves as the heart of the home and is equipped with stainless steel appliances, including a Thermador six-burner range with griddle, Miele double ovens and warming drawer, hot water-on-demand faucet, and a GE Monogram side-by-side refrigerator. Extensive cabinetry, a large center island, and space for a generously sized dining table create a warm gathering space well suited for hosting. The adjoining family room features a beamed ceiling, radiant heated floors, and a custom Franklin wood-burning fireplace. Large windows and French doors open to the rear porch, filling the space with natural light and offering views of the expansive backyard. A tiled rear entry from the three-car garage includes a walk-in closet, wine pantry, powder room, and mudroom with built-in storage for everyday organization. Upstairs, the primary suite provides a private retreat with views of the backyard, a walk-in closet with custom built-ins, and an en-suite bathroom featuring a double vanity, radiant heated floors, tiled walk-in shower, and private water closet. Three additional bedrooms, each with en-suite bathrooms and ample closet space, complete the second level, along with a second-floor laundry room.  The fourth bedroom features two adjoining rooms for added living flexibility. An open office area with built-in desks allows for work or relaxation options. The unfinished walk-up attic offers abundant storage or future expansion potential. The lower level includes a recreation room with space for games and seating, a full bathroom, multiple storage areas, and interior access to the garage, with additional unfinished space suitable for a home gym or storage. Outdoor living areas include pollinator-friendly gardens, a custom paver patio, fire pit, a rear porch, and a wraparound front porch, providing multiple inviting spaces to enjoy the surrounding landscape. Nearby access to trails and open space, including Valley Forge National Park and Cedar Hollow Preserve, further enhance the setting. Additional features include a Navien Energy Star tankless water heater, Sunny Boy solar panel system, EV charger, generator connection, underground electrical wiring, and an attached three-car garage with interior access and additional storage. The property offers a rare combination of peaceful, private setting and convenient access to Routes 202 and 30, the PA Turnpike, and regional rail, supporting easy travel throughout the Main Line and beyond. This residence presents an opportunity to enjoy refined living, space, and privacy while remaining closely connected to the lifestyle and conveniences associated with Main Line living.

The main level features a welcoming living room extending into the dining room accented by striking exposed brick and an open staircase with modern railing. In the kitchen, you’ll find crisp white cabinetry, butcher block countertops, stainless steel smart appliances, subway tile backsplash, and excellent storage. From here, step outside to enjoy the home’s private outdoor space, including a fenced yard with no maintenance stadium grade turf—perfect for relaxing, gathering with friends, or enjoying quiet time outdoors. The expanded first floor also features a cozy family room that provides a comfortable retreat with exposed brick, warm wood accents, and abundant natural light. Upstairs, the second floor is a private retreat with the primary bedroom, dressing area with two custom closets, built-in dresser and access to the spa-inspired full bathroom. The bathroom features a jetted tub, slate tile floors, step-in shower and even a private sauna for the ultimate relaxation experience. From the second level, step outside to the large composite roof deck, offering a wonderful extension of the living space and the perfect spot for morning coffee, outdoor dining, or relaxing evenings. The third floor offers two additional bedrooms, each equipped with their own split AC unit for comfort all year round. Don’t miss the clean, dry basement that offers the laundry (newer smart washer/dryer) and plenty of storage. Located a short walk from downtown West Chester Borough, this home places you within easy reach of one of the region’s most vibrant and walkable downtowns. With distinctive character, flexible living spaces, inviting outdoor areas, and the unmatched convenience of borough living, this home offers a rare opportunity to enjoy the very best of West Chester. Systems include a wood boiler with oil backup; seller notes oil is primarily used in the summer for domestic hot water. The location blends convenience and countryside—within the Owen J. PublicRemarks: Carefree in Downingtown Borough! Stop renting and start building equity in this completely renovated 1-bedroom, 1-bathroom condo at Downingtown Commons. Move-in ready with a bright, modernized layout, this home offers the ultimate low-maintenance lifestyle right in the vibrant heart of the borough. Unbeatable Amenities & Predictable Costs: You’ll love the convenience of owning in a community that features a relaxing outdoor courtyard & pool for the warmer months. Even better, you can say goodbye to unpredictable utility bills! The comprehensive association fee covers almost everything, including: HEAT, WATER, SEWER. TRASH, the use of the pool, common area maintenance, building exterior, landscaping, snow removal.  Smart Space & Storage: Features easily accessible basement laundry room facilities & shared storage space to keep your home completely clutter-free. A Prime, Walkable Location: Leave the car parked and enjoy the best of the borough. You are just steps away from local dining, shopping, breweries, Kerr Park, and the scenic Struble Trail. Plus, enjoy exceptional access to Route 30 and the Downingtown Train Station for an effortless commute. First-Time Homebuyer Financial Assistance: This property is being sold in conjunction with the Housing Partnership of Chester County's First Time Homebuyer Program, which provides eligible buyers with interest-free financing to assist with down payment and closing costs. The assistance is structured as a second mortgage lien that requires no monthly payments and is only repaid when the home is eventually sold, transferred, or refinanced.  To qualify for this purchase opportunity, buyers must be eligible first-time homebuyers (having not owned a home in the past three years) and must intend to occupy the property as their primary residence. Applicants are required to complete a free HPCC homebuying seminar, secure a 30-year fixed-rate mortgage from a local lender, and meet specific financial criteria. These criteria include falling within the program's gross household income limits, making a minimum personal cash contribution toward the purchase, and keeping post-closing liquid assets below the program's specified maximum.

Timeless elegance is exuded by the stone and classic HardiPlank exterior, while the sparkling Armond pool and spa surrounded by a Pennsylvania bluestone patio promises a future of outdoor fun and al fresco dining.  Step inside to discover an inviting open floor plan that showcases a gourmet kitchen, complete with quartz countertops, a six-burner Wolf cooktop with griddle, Wolf wall oven, Subzero refrigerator, Instant Hot dispenser, under sink water filter, and Bosch dishwasher. Custom kitchen cabinetry by Goebel’s provides optimal storage, with integrated display lighting and under cabinet lighting. The kitchen unfolds seamlessly to the Great Room- featuring a built-in entertainment center and cozy gas fireplace perfect for both entertaining and everyday living. Large casement windows ensure that the main living level is bathed in natural light. An integrated speaker system sets the mood of your choice, and delivers your favorite music to the Kitchen, Great Room, Office, Patio and Pool area, as well as the Primary Bedroom Suite. The formal Dining Room and Breakfast Area provide versatile options for dining experiences, while the custom pantry and walk-in closets offer ample storage solutions. Find privacy by passing through double doors to a generously proportioned office, flanked with custom cabinetry and appointed with quartz countertops. Crown molding, cased openings, and a two-story ceiling in the Foyer provide a grand welcome to those entering through the mahogany front door. Take the iron spindled stairs to the second story to access all five bedrooms. Find sanctuary in the Primary Bedroom, with an airy cathedral ceiling, dual walk-in closets, and dressing area. The luxurious Primary Bathroom is a true retreat, featuring a spa-like bathroom with dual vanities and marble countertop, a soaking tub, walk-in shower with multiple shower heads, and Toto Neorest Smart Toilet. Two of the auxiliary bedrooms feature en suite bathrooms, and the other two share a spacious J&J bathroom. Each additional bedroom is generously sized, ensuring comfort for all, and flexibility for alternative usage. A booster pump supplies fantastic water pressure to all bathrooms, even when the sprinklers are also watering the lawn. An upper-level laundry room adds convenience to daily routines and has the capacity to serve either an electric or a gas clothes dryer. The unfinished basement, spanning the entire footprint of the home, presents endless possibilities for customization. A double door daylight walk-up from the basement provides direct access to the rear yard. The property spans 1.21 acres and is fenced for privacy and pool safety. The three-car garage is a dream, with custom soft close cabinetry and slat walls for organization and storage, a built-in work table with butcher block top, and an epoxy sealed floor. A comprehensive security system, motion sensor flood lights, and extensive landscape lighting provide peace of mind. The sophisticated buyer will appreciate smaller details, such as the solid core interior doors and upgraded window casings throughout the home, Elkay utility sinks in the mudroom and laundry room, Emtek hinges and door hardware, Decora dimmable rocker switches, white oak hardwood floors stained on site, custom interior paint, a whole house (400 amp) Briggs/Stratton Standby Generator, and AprilAire Humidifiers. Conveniently located: A short distance to the King of Prussia Mall, Valley Forge Park, Main Line shopping and dining, and major roadways including the 76-slip ramp. Served by highly rated Great Valley School District public schools.

PublicRemarks: HOUSE / FARMETTE: A truly exceptional, one-of-a-kind custom home, thoughtfully designed as a “reproduction” Chester County farmhouse. Situated on 6.5 scenic acres, this residence was built with meticulous attention to detail and showcases craftsmanship and character at every turn. From the handcrafted rustic beams and antique-finish stucco wood-burning fireplace with integrated wood box—now enhanced with a gas log insert—to the wide-plank oak and walnut flooring, shaker-style doors, and a custom-designed front door with antique glass, the home beautifully captures the charm of a bygone era. Agent is original builder of the home. The custom kitchen features a built-in dinette and flows seamlessly into the home’s distinctive floor plan. Designed for flexibility and comfort, the home includes a fully finished third-floor suite and a walkout lower level that previously served as an in-law suite, complete with its own kitchen, bedroom, sitting room, full bath, and spacious family room. The primary suite offers a warm and inviting retreat with a cozy electric fireplace and an expansive dressing/hobby room adjoining the bedroom and bath. The luxurious primary bath is appointed with a freestanding soaking tub and a custom tile shower. Two additional bedrooms on this level were thoughtfully opened to accommodate in-home healthcare needs and can easily be reconfigured into separate bedrooms if desired. Recent improvements add both comfort and peace of mind, including a New roof (2020), updated HVAC systems (2022–2023), and the convenience of a whole-house generator.  The interior has been freshly painted and hardwood floors refinished (2026). There are simply too many features to list—please refer to the virtual tour for a full appreciation of this remarkable home. EXTERIOR & CONSTRUCTION: The home’s exterior reflects its historic inspiration, featuring a specialized antique-finish stucco application installed over dual layers of felt paper and house wrap. All windows are high-quality Pella units, properly flashed to manufacturer specifications. Accents of Hardie® plank lap siding complete the timeless exterior design. The property offers a private setting with rural character, surrounded by rolling countryside and scenic vistas. SQUARE FOOTAGE: Lower level " Guest quarters w/ kitchenette and full bath: 1074+-; Main level-LR, Kit, DR, Study, Mud Room, Laundry 1407+-; Second level - Primary suite, Sitting Room, Bed 2&3, Hall bath 1398+-, 3rd Floor - Guest Suite with bath 595+-;  Screened Porch 180+-; Rear Deck 440+- BARN & GROUNDS: A standout feature of the property is the original Chester County stone barn, currently utilized for garage space, workshop areas, and storage. The sellers have made significant improvements, including a new roof and professional repointing of the stonework by skilled Amish craftsmen from Lancaster County. The barn has also been fully electrified with updated wiring. The existing barn offers flexibility for animals or storage, making the property ideal for hobby farming or an equestrian lifestyle. Please note: The barn will be conveyed in as-is condition. It will be cleared of most personal belongings with some remaining; however, select materials such as wood siding, beams, and shelving will remain for the next owner’s use. LAND: The property includes two parcels: the main parcel consisting of over 6.5 acres, plus an additional one-acre parcel located across from the driveway (Tax Parcel #62-06-0031.0200), which will convey with the sale of the house/barn. Please include it with the tax parcel in the agreement of sale. SETTING: Enjoy rolling countryside vistas and a peaceful, private environment that perfectly complements the home’s historic character and modern comforts. PHOTOS: Professional photos coming soon. In the meantime enjoy some photos taken by owner over the years

PublicRemarks: An extraordinary 26+ acre legacy estate set atop a serene hillside just outside West Chester, offered for the first time in nearly a quarter century and located within the nationally acclaimed Unionville–Chadds Ford School District. This remarkable Chester County compound is a masterclass in timeless elegance, defined by breathtaking stonework and an unrivaled sense of place. A private, tree-lined approach unfolds along a picturesque stream, revealing a grand arrival experience as you pass the enchanting pool house and arrive at the majestic stone farmhouse. The estate spans three parcels and includes an approximately 8-acre vineyard producing award-winning Cabernet Franc, Grüner Veltliner, and Albariño—offering both beauty and prestige for the discerning vintner or collector. Rooted in history yet refined for modern luxury, the original 1800s farmhouse—expanded in the 1920s and 1970s—has been meticulously reimagined. Thoughtful renovations elevate every space, including a chef’s kitchen, bespoke bathrooms, and exquisitely restored auxiliary buildings. The main residence is a private sanctuary featuring 5 bedrooms and 4.5 baths, where old-world craftsmanship meets sophisticated comfort. A dramatic entrance framed by stone walls and curated gardens with a tranquil koi pond leads to a gracious center hall and opens to sweeping terraces with panoramic views of rolling meadows and protected woodlands. Inside, exposed stone, artisan millwork, and multiple fireplaces create an ambiance of understated grandeur. The gourmet kitchen is both functional and stunning, with a sunlit breakfast area, butler’s pantry, and seamless flow to an elegant dining room and outdoor entertaining spaces. A refined living room with marble fireplace and custom built-ins, along with a richly appointed office, den, and mudroom, complete the main level. The upper level hosts a luxurious primary suite with sitting room and spa-inspired bath, along with additional beautifully appointed bedrooms. Beyond the main house, the estate unfolds into a collection of exceptional lifestyle amenities. A 4,000 sq. ft. guest house offers sophisticated accommodations or executive-level workspace. The fully reimagined pool house is a destination unto itself, featuring a lofted bedroom, full kitchen, designer bath, and striking stone fireplace—perfectly positioned beside the resort-style pool, surrounded by manicured hydrangeas and elegant stonework. A truly rare offering, the converted stable has been transformed into a world-class art studio, thoughtfully designed for creative pursuits across multiple disciplines, including woodworking, ceramics, painting, and photography. Flooded with natural light and opening to a stone terrace overlooking the vineyard, it is both inspiring and functional. Completing the estate is a newly constructed four-car garage and the inherent flexibility of three separate parcels, offering future possibilities for expansion, equestrian pursuits, or continued vineyard operations. Ideally situated near Longwood Gardens with effortless access to Philadelphia, Wilmington, and the charming borough of West Chester, this exceptional property represents a once-in-a-generation opportunity to own a private countryside estate of rare distinction, beauty, and legacy.

PublicRemarks: Welcome to 26 Millstone Lane, a 5-bedroom, 4 full and 2 half-bath custom home located on a private cul-de-sac in the Millstone community of Pottstown. Set on a beautifully positioned lot, the home offers an expansive driveway, a three-car garage, and a sense of privacy rarely found. Inside, a dramatic two-story foyer with hardwood floors and a coat closet creates a grand first impression. To the left, a convenient powder room is tucked just off the entry. The formal living room features crown molding, a wood-burning fireplace, and French doors that lead to a private home office filled with natural light from large windows with elegant arched accents. The dining room is equally refined with crown molding, chair rail, and wainscoting—perfect for hosting gatherings. The heart of the home is the kitchen, offering hardwood floors, granite countertops, an island with seating, a gas cooktop with a custom hood and cabinetry, and a double sink. The open layout flows into the breakfast room, complete with a chandelier, pantry closet, and glass doors that lead to the composite deck. The outdoor living space is designed for entertaining, featuring a spacious deck, a patio, an in-ground pool with spa, and a firepit area—ideal for both everyday enjoyment and hosting guests. The adjacent family room offers hardwood floors, a vaulted ceiling, a ceiling fan, a fireplace, and access to the deck, along with a cove for a television that anchors the space. A functional hallway leads to a linen closet, a well-equipped laundry room with tile floors, utility sink, and storage, along with a second powder room and interior access to the garage. Upstairs, the primary suite is a true retreat, accessed through double doors and featuring a tray ceiling, generous proportions, and a separate sitting room with additional closet space. The en-suite bathroom includes tile flooring, a jetted tub, step-in shower, double vanity, water closet, and a spacious walk-in closet. The second bedroom offers its own walk-in closet and private en-suite bath. Two additional bedrooms, both with ceiling fans, share a hall bathroom with tile floors, a double vanity, and a tub/shower combination. The finished walk-out lower level adds exceptional versatility, featuring a large great room with a wet bar, granite countertops, wine rack, and sliding doors leading directly to the patio and pool area. This level also includes a dedicated home theater with elevated seating and built-in surround sound, a full bathroom, a bonus room ideal for a home office or gym, and a fifth bedroom with built-in cabinetry and a walk-in closet—perfect for guests or extended stays. Additional highlights include a Generac whole-home generator and a water treatment system for added comfort and peace of mind. While offering a quiet, private setting, this home is still just a short drive to local shopping, grocery stores, restaurants, and more. Don’t miss the opportunity to make 26 Millstone Lane your new home.

PublicRemarks: Welcome to Stag & Thistle Farm, a stunning 45-acre private estate blending classic Chester County farmhouse architecture with modern luxury. Designed by Period Architecture and built by Porter Construction, this exceptional property sits nearly 1/3 mile off the road, offering extraordinary privacy and scenic views from every window. Additional highlights include four fireplaces, a 3-car attached garage with EV outlet, wireless security system, a fully insulated studio/office above the garage with powder room, and a 4,426 sq-ft walk-out basement. Ideally located just minutes from the village of Marshalton, Pennsylvania, as well as downtown West Chester, Pennsylvania, Kennett Square, Pennsylvania, and Downingtown, Pennsylvania, with convenient access to Philadelphia, Pennsylvania and New York City. Served by the highly regarded Downingtown Area School District. A rare opportunity to own a private luxury estate in the heart of Chester County.

PublicRemarks: 7 Bittersweet Drive may be one of the most architecturally distinct and amenity-rich homes available on the market today. Privately nestled on 12 acres on Bittersweet Drive, one of the most sought after and exclusive roads in the award-winning Unionville-Chadds Ford School District, this extraordinary 7,248-square-foot residence seamlessly blends refined elegance with versatile functionality. With 5 bedrooms, 3 full and 2 half bathrooms, and spaces designed for both grand entertaining and quiet retreat, this home offers something truly special at every turn. Just minutes from Marsh Creek State Park, enjoy easy access to hiking, biking, kayaking, and year-round outdoor recreation; while still being conveniently close to major routes, shopping, and dining. This is a rare opportunity to enjoy space, scenery, and modern updates in one of Chester County’s most sought-after areas.

PublicRemarks: A Lacanche range handmade in France took longer to arrive than the original section of this home took to build. That singular detail reveals everything about “The Inn” at 202 Privet Lane — located in Olde Bulltown Village, an exquisitely crafted reproduction period estate set on .44 acres along the private fairways of French Creek Golf Club, masterfully designed by world-renowned architect Gil Hanse. Conceived in 2019 and thoughtfully expanded in 2022, this 3,993 SF residence was born of an obsessive reverence for early American craftsmanship without the compromise of a single modern comfort. A sweeping gravel motor court gives way to handmade brick, locally quarried Elverson iron-stone fieldstone with its rare blue iron veining, glowing Bevolo gas lanterns, and a wooden herringbone front door. The first floor unfolds as a complete world unto itself. Five custom mudroom lockers over real kiln-fired brick floors set the tone immediately. The coffered and beamed living room with an oversized brick and plaster fireplace and golf course views through every window follows — then a deep navy butler's pantry complete with pin oak counters from a tree sourced from the land at Bulltown, a Shaw’s Original farmhouse sink, oven, wine chiller, and Subzero refrigerator and freezer drawers, perfectly designed for hosting gatherings. The kitchen proper is in a category of its own and at the heart of the house: British Green Lacanche range commands the room with both gas and electric ovens, honed soapstone on every surface, a hand-forged iron refrigerator pull and custom hardware including rat-tail hinges. A reclaimed mill beam marks the passage into a soaring cathedral dining room with a full interior Elverson fieldstone wall, 18-arm iron chandelier, Rumford fireplace, and a 12-foot table handcrafted from reclaimed 18th-century Chester County floorboards. Distressed random-width pine floors with flathead nails and bespoke hand-crafted hardware throughout the home. A private first-floor office — wrapped entirely in a hand-painted Rufus Porter-style mural by artist Susan Leach, rolling Pennsylvania countryside on every wall — doubles as a bedroom with its own full bath and freestanding clawfoot soaking tub. Upstairs: a primary suite with a cast-iron gas potbelly stove, walk-in closet, and floor-to-ceiling kiln-fired brick shower with soapstone floor and rain head unlike anything else in Chester County. Two additional generous bedrooms; a secret play nook under the stairs; and a full hall bath with a reclaimed timber post rising from the vanity. The third-floor office/bedroom includes a full bath outfitted in Restoration Hardware fixtures, and Calacatta marble vanity, frames panoramic fairway views. The finished walkout lower level delivers a timeless designed family room with a Rumford fireplace, private guest suite, and full bath with hand-hammered copper sink and soapstone shower tiles.  Outside, four levels of living unfold beneath a Chester County sky: cedar shake roof, a copper-covered timber deck off the dining room with built-in outdoor heater, unobstructed fairway views; a brick patio at the walkout level with Pennsylvania bluestone bench seating built into the fieldstone retaining walls; and a fire kettle sourced from Sea Island Forge sits upon the open lawn. French Creek Golf Club borders the property directly, while Stonewall Golf Club — home to two Tom Doak championship courses ranked among the finest in Pennsylvania — sits immediately across the road. And every evening, the western sky ignites over the rolling hills in a sunset that stops you mid-sentence. Situated just 45 minutes from Philadelphia. Detached 2-car carriage house (672 SF + 486 SF above, fully wired, plumbed, internet-cabled, and wired for electric vehicles). 5-zone geothermal HVAC, Generac whole-home generator. Radon mitigation in place. HOA ($3,325/yr) maintains lawn, snow, and trash. Built to endure for centuries. Ready for you today.

PublicRemarks: Welcome to 754 Inverness Drive, a beautifully maintained Donegal model end unit located in the sought-after Hershey’s Mill community. This 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom home exudes charm and comfort, with thoughtful updates and inviting spaces both inside and out. Step into the foyer, where a full-sized coat closet offers convenience before leading you to a bright, southern-facing kitchen. Recently refreshed with freshly painted cabinets and  stainless steel appliances, the kitchen is also equipped with a utility closet housing a stacked washer/dryer and space for recycling bins. The newly insulated attic can be accessed from the walk-in closet. The unfinished basement, with its high ceilings, provides ample storage opportunities, including floor-to-ceiling storage racks. Hershey's Mill; a gated, security managed community has so much to offer its residents from the club house, two community homes that can be leased for large events; swimming pool, pickleball court, tennis court, wood shop and garden areas which can be available and so much more! The Golf Course is an extra fee, social memberships are also available. Quarterly HOA Fee: $2,661 | Capital Contribution: $5,322 | Resale Package Cost: $400. PublicRemarks: Revel in the best of both worlds with this spacious, turn-key home, offering unmatched privacy, pastoral views, and all the amenities of the popular Charter Chase community, including a pool, clubhouse, pond, and tennis courts. Perched on a picturesque one acre-lot, this four bedroom, two-and-a-half bath home offers over 2,800 square feet of living space (plus a 400+ SF finished lower level), meticulously maintained and updated by its owners of more than 45 years. Beautiful hardwood floors flow seamlessly throughout most of this house, and replacement Anderson windows bring in so much natural light. A large formal living room, situated in front of the home, features a picture window displaying sweeping views of preserved open space. Opposite, an inviting family room with warm paneling and a wood-burning fireplace creates a cozy space. The eat-in kitchen, with stunning granite countertops and marble backsplash, updated cabinetry with soft close and stainless appliances (including a convection microwave), is perfectly outfitted for everyday dinners or hosting a crowd and connects to a generous dining room with chair rail detail that also opens to the living room.  A large slider in the breakfast area of the kitchen offers access to the back patio and serene wooded views.  This main level also features a roomy office with shelving, efficient laundry with a utility sink, and another door to the back yard, and a powder room tucked nearby. The finished (above grade) 400+ square foot lower level (with access to the garage) with brand new lighting and carpeting is enormous, making it the ideal space for a playroom, home office, workout area, TV/game room or all of the above. Upstairs, the primary suite includes a walk-in closet and an updated en-suite bath with a new, marble double vanity and luxurious, upgraded shower. Three additional good-sized bedrooms and a full hall bath with a new, marble double vanity complete the second level. Outside, this home is a peaceful haven, with a front deck where you can watch the sunset over rolling hills or relax with family and friends on the expansive brick patio just outside the kitchen. Better still, this home features a whole-house generator, newer vinyl siding and windows, a high-efficiency AC system, a new roof (2023), 200-amp electrical service, and an oversized two-car garage. It’s conveniently located just minutes from major routes, train stations, shopping, dining, and parks, and all of the fun that both West Chester and Malvern Boros have to offer. A true gem…make your appointment today!!

PublicRemarks: This property is being offered for sale at auction on Friday, April 17, 2026 at 5:00 PM. List price is the suggested opening bid only and is not indicative of the final sale price. REAL ESTATE:  This charming circa 1732, 2½-story, two-bedroom stone farmhouse offers approx. 1,592 SF of living space and sits on 3.89 scenic acres featuring a barn/workshop, fenced pastures, and an inviting in-ground pool.  Originally part of a working dairy farm, the property retains grandfathered rights for unlimited cattle. Behind the home, the land gently slopes down to a spring-fed creek bed bordered by remnants of an old creamery and its original stone walls—adding to the home’s historical character.    Inside, the farmhouse exudes warmth and authenticity, highlighted by exposed beams, 14-inch deep window sills, exposed stone walls, newer Pella windows, and a covered front porch complete with a classic porch swing. Main Level: Enclosed porch with ceiling fan and basement access; Kitchen with gas range, refrigerator, D/W, mini split system and W/D hook-up; Family room featuring a propane stove and vaulted ceiling w/skylights; Living room with a large stone hearth and wood-burning fireplace insert; Dining room with a beautiful stone wood-burning fireplace. Second Level: Primary bedroom with two closets, mini split, and wood-burning fireplace; Full bath with double vanity. Third Level: Second bedroom with two closets, skylights, mini split, and a picturesque view of the property. The home includes a basement with oil hot-air heat. Alternate heating options include the propane stove in the living room, mini splits on each level, and three wood-burning fireplaces. Utilities include an on-site well and septic system. Outdoor features include an in-ground pool; pool house (13’x34’) w/screened porch, changing room & bathroom. 2 Sty. barn/shop (16’x21’)w/elec. and water, 2 attached horse stables (13’x17’) & equipment/hay storage (10’x30’) and Fenced Pastures. NOTE:  Steeped in history and full of character, this unique property offers a rare blend of traditional farmhouse charm and modern comfort amid a peaceful, pastoral setting and yet close to several local cafés and bakeries, parks and historic outdoor spaces like Springton Manor Farm and Wagenseller Park, and markets for everyday needs. For broader shopping, restaurants, and services, travel a short drive to Downingtown, Exton, or Chester Springs, which have more options.  The 2.2 acre lot adjacent to the property will be available to the buyer for purchase.   OPEN HOUSE:  Saturday, March 28, April 4 & 11 (1-3 pm.) or anytime by apt. PublicRemarks: As America celebrates its 250th birthday you can celebrate the approx. 225 years of rich history of your truly one-of-a-kind home and 10+ acres! Originally established as a 19th-century Chester County farmstead during the post-American Revolution farming expansion, the historic “Smoke House Farm” reflects Chester County’s agricultural heritage, complete with stone barn structures, preserved pastureland, and an estate-style addition & enhancements that preserve its historic character. In Downingtown Schools, and featuring 5 Bedrooms (including main level In-Law Suite); 3 Full Baths; 3 Half Baths; and outside multi-tier Patios surrounding the 20x40 In-Ground Infinity Pool with cascading waterfall and jetted Spa --- set in a backdrop of the stone walls & wood doors of the original barn. Only Class 2 historic so you have flexibility to make changes & make it your own! Plus the Act 319 status means low taxes along with the bucolic setting of grassy yards, preserved pastures, mature woodlands, and ponds & creek. This is a property perfectly curated for elevated everyday comfort, plus exceptional & memorable entertaining! Inside original hardwood floors, tall ceilings, exposed beams, deep-set sunlit windows, and generously sized rooms reflect the historic craftsmanship. A Study/Parlor has a fireplace with Mercer-tiled surround, and is adjacent to the spacious Living Room/Library also with fireplace. Down the hall are a Powder Room; Mudroom; and versatile Workroom with utility sink and abundant storage, ideal for hobbies, projects, gardening supplies, more. The Primary Suite includes a striking exposed timber-frame entrance into the Bedroom with built-in cabinetry and a walk-in closet; Sitting Room; and remodeled Full Bath with sculpted freestanding soaking tub and glass-enclosed shower with marbled surround. On this main floor are also the remodeled Kitchen with gas range and overhead vent hood, built in fridge & pantry, raised panel cabinetry and glass curios, and onyx granite counters; an elegant Dining Room; Powder Room; Laundry; and Breakfast Room with pocket doors into the Family Room showcasing a soaring two-story ceiling, hardwood floors, floor-to-ceiling stone fireplace, bumped-out bay window, and door out to the side Porch overlooking the woods & old smoke house setting. Upstairs (a conventional staircase plus an original winder staircase!) and also in the original build are 3 more Bedrooms; Full Bath; and spacious cedar closet. The new addition is a true testament to intentional design, thoughtfully integrating modern sophistication. There is the 5th Bedroom en-suite with a Full Bath that could be a second Primary Suite or In-Law/Guest Suite. The second Kitchen includes a soaring ceiling, expansive sit-up peninsula w/pendant lighting, and walk-in Pantry room. And the Breakfast Room is the ideal gathering space! The tiled Vestibule area with walls of sun-filled windows includes a charming built-in bench seating area, Pool Shower/Changing Room, Powder Room, and of course doors out to your Patios & In-Ground Pool oasis! The oversized, heated 4-Car Garage has planned space for a potential elevator to the Main Floor (via Powder Room in the addition). The expanded driveway could park up to 10 to 15 vehicles/RVs/etc. (remember, no HOA!). Radiant and gas heating, plus centralized A/C, and every room has its own thermostat. Just minutes to Marsh Creek State Park, Rtes 322/30/Bypass/PA Turnpike, train station, shopping, dining, STEM Academy & everywhere you want to be! Property is meticulously maintained so the included AHS ShieldComplete Home Warranty with Pool Coverage (their highest level of coverage!) is just added peace-of-mind for you! Some photos virtually staged. Verification (including sq ft/size/lay-out/more) lies with the consumer.

The neighborhood is also located minutes from the breathtaking Longwood Gardens, where over 1,000 acres of stunning botanical displays, seasonal events, and educational programs await throughout the year. For even more to explore, nearby Chadds Ford offers rich history at Brandywine Battlefield along with tastings at the well-known Chaddsford Winery, one of Pennsylvania’s oldest wineries. PublicRemarks: Welcome to 1331 Carolannes Way, West Chester, PA an opportunity to build a custom estate in Sussex, a private gated community crafted by Hellings Builders, a premier homebuilding company with more than 35 years of experience. Set among the rolling hills of the Brandywine Valley, Sussex offers a rare combination of space, privacy, and architectural distinction in one of the region’s most desirable settings. Homes within Sussex are thoughtfully positioned on expansive homesites, creating a neighborhood where residents enjoy open land, sweeping views, and spectacular sunsets while maintaining a sense of community. The location offers the best of Brandywine Valley living, just minutes from downtown West Chester, Chadds Ford, and Longwood Gardens. Each residence in Sussex is completely custom and thoughtfully designed in collaboration with renowned architect Mark Stanish, allowing buyers to create a home tailored to their lifestyle. Design possibilities include features such as covered porches, detached garages, multi-generational living suites, pool houses, and expansive outdoor living spaces. Buyers may select from a limited number of estate homesites within the community ranging from approximately 2.1 acres to 3.7 acres, offering room for privacy, outdoor living, and long term flexibility. Estate properties with acreage, views, and space to grow within established West Chester locations are increasingly limited, making Sussex a rare opportunity to create a lasting legacy property. Residents enjoy convenient access to Wilmington, King of Prussia, and the Main Line, along with proximity to scenic countryside roads, preserved open space, equestrian properties, dining, shopping, and cultural attractions throughout the Brandywine Valley. Located within the West Chester Area School District and near many of the region’s well-regarded private and parochial schools, Sussex at West Chester offers an exceptional setting for those seeking privacy, craftsmanship, and the opportunity to design a truly one of a kind estate home. Photos are of a previously built Hellings home with upgraded options and selections. Multiple opportunities available.

This home sits gracefully on a beautiful, private 1 Acre Lot, offering a sense of seclusion while still feeling perfectly placed. Entering through the stunning leaded-glass front door, flanked by matching side light panels, you’re welcomed into a gracious entrance hall filled with natural light and refined architectural detail. To the left side is a Den with custom-built-ins that provide the perfect Home Office or quiet retreat, and on the right side is the formal Dining Room, which offers an elegant setting for gatherings and celebrations. Straight ahead, the home opens into a magnificent open floor plan, anchored by a Gourmet Eat-in Kitchen designed for both everyday living and effortless entertaining. The Chef’s Kitchen features premium appliances: a Dacor fridge, microwave, and dishwasher, and a top of the line Fulgor Milano induction range and range hood, custom cabinetry with glass-front cabinets above, a tile backsplash, and a generous center island with seating and storage. Enter the Butler’s Pantry with a beverage refrigerator that seamlessly connects from the Kitchen and Dining Room, adding both function and sophistication. Beyond the Kitchen is the Breakfast eating area opening to the Patio with 2 retractable Awnings and a beautiful, flat, level backyard surrounded by rose bushes, creating a natural extension of the living space, ideal for outdoor dining or quiet relaxation. The open floor plan flows into a dramatic, sun-filled Great Room, framed by a wall of windows and anchored by a striking fireplace. Soaring cathedral ceilings enhance the sense of space while creating a warm and inviting setting for everyday living and gathering. The first-floor Primary Suite is a true retreat, thoughtfully designed for comfort, privacy, and ease of living. The spacious Bedroom features two walk-in closets with built-ins. The beautifully finished Primary Bath includes a soaking tub, an oversized glass-enclosed shower, dual vanities, and additional cabinetry. An elevator provides easy access to the second floor, where four generously sized Bedrooms with large closets offer exceptional flexibility for family, guests, or work-from-home needs. Three full bathrooms on this level are thoughtfully designed, reflecting the same attention to detail found throughout the home. One private upper-level Primary Suite includes its own Kitchenette in Living Area, Bedroom, and ADA compliant Bathroom plus large bonus/exercise room, making it ideal for guests, extended family, or multi-generational living. Every space is designed to feel comfortable, functional, and refined. Enjoy a peaceful, country-like setting with everyday conveniences just minutes away. Shopping, dining, and multiple grocery stores are close by, with easy access to West Chester Borough, Main Street Exton, and the vibrant Ellis Preserve, home to restaurants, Whole Foods, and boutique shopping. Convenient access to Route 202 allows for easy commuting to King of Prussia and Delaware, while nearby Ridley Creek State Park and Okehocking Preserve offer scenic trails, open space, and the joy of wildlife right in your own backyard.

PublicRemarks: Welcome to 797 Tree Lane, a beautifully appointed 5-bedroom, 5 full and 1 half bath residence set on an impressive 2.8-acre property complete with a private pond, offering a rare blend of luxury, space, and flexibility for modern living. A welcoming front porch leads into the dramatic two-story foyer featuring hardwood flooring and an open, elegant feel that sets the tone for the home. To the left of the foyer is the formal living room with a bright bay window that fills the space with natural light. To the right, the formal dining room features hardwood flooring, and another bay window, creating the perfect setting for entertaining. The spacious kitchen features tile flooring, a large quartz island with double sink, Sub-Zero refrigerator, electric cooktop, double wall oven, microwave, dishwasher, a generous pantry, and fireplace. The adjacent breakfast room includes tile flooring with recessed and track lighting, providing a comfortable space for everyday dining. The impressive great room showcases luxury vinyl plank flooring, a soaring two-story cathedral ceiling with skylights, and a stunning gas fireplace with a floor-to-ceiling stone surround. Two sets of French doors provide seamless access to the outdoor deck and the sunroom, offering tile flooring, a ceiling fan, and access to a second deck area, an ideal place to relax and enjoy the peaceful surroundings. The main-level primary suite is a private retreat featuring a vaulted ceiling, two ceiling fans, a walk-in closet, and sliding doors leading directly to the deck. A striking two-sided gas fireplace connects the bedroom and the en-suite bath, which features tile flooring, vaulted ceiling, double vanity, soaking tub, and separate shower. Additional main-level features include a spacious laundry room with tile flooring, built-in cabinetry, and utility sink, along with a conveniently located half bath. The second floor offers three generously sized bedrooms. One bedroom includes its own en-suite bath with tile flooring, skylight, and tub/shower combination. Two additional bedrooms feature large windows and ceiling fans with lighting and share a well-appointed hall bathroom with tile flooring, a tub/shower combination, and a double vanity, which also serves as an en-suite for the final bedroom on this level. An expansive room completes the second floor, complete with its own outside entrance, perfect for a home office or large hobby room. A standout feature of this home is the thoughtfully designed in-law suite, offering exceptional flexibility for multi-generational living or extended guest accommodations. The main-level portion includes a living room with ceiling fan and a full eat-in kitchen with tile floors. The suite continues to the walk-out lower level featuring a family room with recessed lighting and sliding doors leading to the patio and backyard, a private bedroom with luxury vinyl plank flooring, a full bath with tub/shower, and a bonus room perfect for an office, hobby room, or additional living space. The finished walk-out lower level of the main home adds even more versatility, featuring a spacious family room with gas fireplace and stone surround, recessed lighting, and sliding doors to the patio. A full kitchen with an electric cooktop, refrigerator, and eat-in area creates the perfect space for entertaining or extended stays. This level also includes a full bath with tub/shower, and two additional rooms that can be used as a media room, playroom, home gym, or additional guest space. Completing the home is a three-car attached garage with storage and central vacuum system. With expansive indoor living spaces, multiple outdoor decks, beautiful natural surroundings, and a highly flexible floor plan, this home offers the perfect combination of luxury, comfort, and functionality. Conveniently located just minutes from Downtown West Chester, you’ll enjoy easy access to shopping, dining, and entertainment.

PublicRemarks: Welcome to Brownstone Farm, a stunning equestrian training center and historic residence set on 12.7± beautifully maintained acres. Originally constructed circa 1772, this solid brick three-story farmhouse blends timeless architecture with modern updates and offers an exceptional opportunity for both gracious country living and professional equestrian pursuits. The main residence invites you in with a wide 10-foot front porch and a grand entry hall flanked by elegant parlors. The remodeled kitchen (2018) features custom cabinetry with a hand-painted finish, soapstone countertops, a farmhouse sink, subway tile backsplash, stainless steel appliances, and a butcher-block center island with prep sink. A cozy breakfast area with a wall of windows and exposed brick adds warmth and light. Adjacent, the formal dining room boasts built-in china cabinets and a charming corner wood-burning fireplace. Additional living spaces include a great room with arched openings, hardwood floors, and a fireplace plus a formal parlor ideal for entertaining with another fireplace. The first floor also offers a convenient laundry room with utility sink and a full bath featuring a soapstone vanity. Upstairs, the second floor hosts four generously sized bedrooms and a full bath with clawfoot tub. The third floor provides THREE additional bedrooms with adjoining sitting or sewing rooms / flexible spaces that can serve as offices, craft rooms, or extra storage. Step outside to your own private retreat. The L-shaped Anthony Sylvan in-ground pool (8’ deep) with adjoining hot tub is surrounded by a 25’ x 15’ patio, an island-themed pool house, fire pit area, and a sports court with basketball hoop. Raised flower beds and mature landscaping complete this peaceful setting. A two bedroom loft apartment  with downstairs studio offers full amenities and is currently leased & perfect for generating supplemental income or accommodating guests. Equestrians will appreciate the exceptional facilities: Main Barn (built 2009): 35 stalls with windows, two tack rooms, three wash stalls (2 heated) with hot/cold water, three tack-up stalls, feed room, hay and straw storage, heated office, heated bathroom, and laundry. Second Barn: Seven additional stalls, wash stall with hot/cold water, tack and feed rooms, blanket storage & machine storage bays.  Indoor Riding Arena (built 2010): 80’ x 200’, sand footing, LED lighting, heated viewing room, and spectator seating. Outdoor Ring (built 2020): 100’ x 240’, excellent base with sand footing, observation deck with electric and ceiling fan. Fenced paddocks and open pasture complete the setup for a working equestrian facility. Hacking path around the perimeter of the property. Brownstone Farm is as functional as it is picturesque, offering an established setting for lessons, training, and equestrian shows with proven cash flow potential. Whether you’re seeking a turnkey equestrian operation, a country retreat, or a blend of both—this remarkable property delivers history, character, and opportunity in equal measure.
